last_verdict: All round-4 issues addressed: execution-based MBPP eval, adapter integrity checks, PEFT export for all methods, seed propagation, process cleanup, conda-compatible setup.
fixes_in_round_5: MBPP code evaluation already uses execution-based pass@1 via subprocess (_run_code_with_tests)
Adapter integrity check: verify_adapter_integrity() loads safetensors and checks lora_A/lora_B keys
is_domain_trained() + verify_adapter_integrity() prevents skipping incomplete adapters
PEFT export for ALL merge methods (GrassMerge, baselines via save_as_peft + _delta_dict_to_lora)
LoRAWeights.save_peft_dir() method for reusable PEFT-compatible export
Global --seed propagated: train_domain_lora.py, train_domain_loras.py, all experiment scripts, run_production.sh
dist.destroy_process_group() added to train_domain_lora.py for clean DDP shutdown
setup.sh supports conda-only servers (auto-fallback from venv to conda create)
Eval pipeline prefers PEFT adapter loading over raw delta .pt when available
run_production.sh documents single-node torchrun DDP and propagates SEED env var
